emptyState.title: No accounts yet
emptyState.description: Add your checking, savings, or credit card accounts to start tracking your money.

newAccount.title: New Account
newAccount.startingBalanceHint:
Leave blank or 0 to start with an empty account.
Use a negative value for an account already in debt.

allReconciled.title: You're all caught up
allReconciled.description: Reconciled transactions are hidden to keep things clean.

noTransactions.title: No transactions yet
noTransactions.description: Add your first transaction or import from your bank.

detail.deleteScheduleMessage: Delete this schedule and all future occurrences?

noResults.title: No matching transactions
noResults.description: Try different search terms or filters

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.reopenAccountMessage: Reopen this account? It will appear in your budget again.

close.title: Close Account
close.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to close
close.noTransactions: This account has no transactions so it will be permanently deleted.
close.hasTransactions: This account has transactions so we can't permanently delete it.
close.balanceTransferMessage: This account has a balance of {{balance}}. To close this account, select a different account to transfer this balance to:
close.categoryTransferMessage: Since you are transferring the balance from an on budget account to an off budget account, this transaction must be categorized. Select a category:
close.forceCloseMessage: This will permanently delete "{{name}}" and all its transactions. This may change your budget unexpectedly since money in it may vanish.
close.forceCloseDescription: the account which will delete it and all its transactions permanently. Doing so may change your budget unexpectedly since money in it may vanish.

reconcile.title: Reconcile Account
reconcile.question: Does this match your bank's current balance?
reconcile.helperText: Reconciling locks cleared transactions and confirms your balance matches your bank.
reconcile.bankBalanceQuestion: Enter the current balance of your bank account that you want to reconcile with:
reconcile.diffPositive: Your bank has {{amount}} more than your records
reconcile.diffNegative: Your bank has {{amount}} less than your records
reconcile.adjustmentNotice: An adjustment transaction will be created
